title: Blad Pack
body:
# Blad Modpack (WIP)
a modpack originally designed for a two week minecraft session that lasted too long. 

It now is technical, automation and adventure modpack, with the idea of making vanilla mechanics neccessary for progression.

# Work in Progress
The modpack is still in a alpha stage, expect frequent updates, game breaking changes, mods addition or removal!

# What to Expect
## Automation and Progression:
We’ve included mods that allow for the automation of key processes, making tasks easier as you advance through the game. Whether you lean towards technical setups like Mekanism or prefer the farming-centered Mystical Agriculture, the choice is yours.

## Exploration and RPG Enhancements:
A richer Overworld, Nether, and End, with improved structure generation and new dimensions like The Aether.
Unique artifacts, backpacks, and treasures waiting to be discovered.
More immersive survival mechanics: thirst, temperature, and seasonal farming cycles that challenge your skills.
Dangerous mobs to add excitement to every encounter.

## Balanced Crafting and Gameplay:
To maintain a satisfying story progression, we’ve adjusted some crafting recipes:
Incorporating Netherite for high-tier items, using Shulker Boxes instead of chests for backpacks, incorporating some Aether materials into other mods crafting recipes and so on for a more rewarding endgame feeling.

## Write Your Own Story
With just the right balance of difficulty and rewarding gameplay, this is the perfect modpack for those who seek a refined minecraft experience with a touch of survival, exploration, and RPG elements.

The adventure is yours to create!
